yourPlate.text: PCON feedback: Shawn Metzger — due today; relationship form needs your judgment.
Wilson Pike tour / 144 zoning — tour at 11; confirm city/zoning path for Redline/HopeSmiles.
Carole MRI Data Export — 10 AM; decide scope and what I can automate afterward.
Hamilton/Subway renewal — Mathison needs yes/wait before sending terms.
Five Below/Malone — don’t sign until hard costs/work-letter issues are clean.
GMX/Hamilton sale — keep pressure; no rolling extensions without a firm resolve-this-week posture.
Gallatin/Trader Joe’s parking — broker message needs your voice: frontage/key parking can’t be given up.

prepping.text: Smart LED Highland — summarize application, financials, and Carson’s marked lease changes.
Swig Sevierville — run exclusive language and flag coffee/drink blockers.
Great Greek Maple Row — prep grease-trap / locked-door issue list for Clay/Jacob.
Evansville Rehab Big Lots — prep TI amortization + ROFR talking points.
Maple Row leads — Jennifer/Girish responses and current availability/rent context.
McMinnville UPS/behavioral health/facade — lease/RFP/facade follow-up packet.
Buena Vista — outreach list + flyer/sign/bid-materials next-step packet.
Adam/Fostr/Yardi — prep onboarding/check-in and safe-use rollout checklist.

handling.text: AM Sweep file refreshed for today with full classifications.
Command Center intel pushed; Focus 3 refresh queued from this briefing.
Slack overnight scan completed — no unanswered human DMs.
Asana/memory duplicates flagged for cleanup after your “go”.
Research-ready items queued: Domino’s Malone, Richard Burt list, cord options.

deferred.text: Ryan Jordan/Shelbyville — waiting on response; Keystone Sevierville — waiting on denial letter; Spirit Hamilton — waiting on site feedback; Joe Wesley/Yasser — waiting on replies; Label Shopper/Adam housing/setup backlog — future/conditional.

new.name: Pell City Marketplace
new.status: Physical Therapy / Home Health Fun plot twist: The original home health company is also now back trying to see if we can slot them in the middle space and get three deals done at once. We had a brief call last Friday and we were dusting off our old LOI.

new.name: Evansville
new.status: Where Ya Bin The call with Mitch did happen on Tuesday - I filled you in on it. We are waiting on Mitch/Where Ya Bin after he reviews the material. Just shot him a text this morning Easterseals Still waiting on Laurie/CEO feedback. Laurie said the CEO meeting got cancelled because of the CEO's schedule and DC travel, and she expected to connect the following week. I will ping her today and get an update

new.name: Firework Tent Details
new.status: It took a minute, but I finally worked through all the details for these Fireworks leases. They will be going out via DocuSign to you this week. Here are the properties:

new.name: Malone
new.property: Shoe Dept: Hold to pay at a later date

new.name: Russellville
new.property: ABC Store: Hold to pay at a later date

dropped.name: Emerson Hall / Lately Projects
dropped.lastStatus: Ready to rock and roll. Let me know if there is anything you need me to do

dropped.name: Just leaving this here to talk about Shelbyville
dropped.property: Just leaving this here to talk about Shelbyville

progressed.name: Five Below
progressed.to: Five Below's attorney sent the lease draft. I will review this week and also send it to Ashby so that way we can circle up on it

progressed.name: McMinnville Plaza
progressed.from: Petty and I worked through the specifics, and he is taking the most recent version to get sign off from UPS. Pell City Physical Therapy / Home Health I can explain more in our meeting, but this one hit a little speed bump with their legal team, so it is having to go back through approvals. The short version is they wanted some broad assignment language that the broker and I discussed and were on the same page about, but he didn't document very well, so their legal team flagged it and rejected it on first go
progressed.to: UPS Store This moved forward. Amy/UPS signed the LOI on 5/5. I returned the fully executed LOI on 5/6.We can get started on a lease while they get final approval from REC.

progressed.name: Maple Row / Hendersonville
progressed.from: They did a site visit the other day and are waiting for some numbers back.
progressed.to: Great Greek This is down to one issue. Construction numbers came back, and Joey returned LOI comments with only one change: tenant wants the ‘allegedly’ dead rooftop HVAC unit replaced now instead of just covered by the later HVAC language.

updated.name: Malone Plaza
updated.from: Approved at REC. Clay and I have a kick-off call with their construction team this afternoon

updated.name: Gastonia / Dixie Village
updated.from: The laundromat operator and I have a call scheduled for Wednesday to go over the specifics in the lease. Evansville Evansville / Where Ya Bin call got pushed to tomorrow. Evansville Easterseals has not talked with their CEO yet but is going to keep me in the loop.
updated.to: Chad Vang laundromat I talked to Chad. Their other laundromat has taken longer than anticipated to get up and running. Instead of continuing to follow up, we put a call on the calendar four weeks from now to circle back up

updated.name: Hope Smiles
updated.from: They are pretty sold out on Creekside Crossing currently. They want to look at one more suite that was locked in there when we toured the first time. The LL is working on a test fit (for one of the spaces they looked at the other week) and running the numbers, so hope smiles can make a decision. Fostr Yardi data has made it into the platform, but still needs lots of configuring on their end. But it's big time that you can go in and see where it's headed. I can show it to you
updated.to: I slacked you the PDF, but we put together a tenant profile for Creekside Crossing LL. I was impressed with Claude Design. Hopefully the LL is too… Fostr I had a good call with Fostr last week. We are closing in on the Yardi integration. I can share more 2008 Johnson flyer I'll show you what Jarvis came up with and what Claude Design came up with

items.text: Hamilton - finalize REA for Dutch Bros outparcel (with Melissa)
items.detail: Melissa using Hamilton as template. Jacob coordinating.

items.text: Lebanon - reach out to Mark (Eagle Nest) re: end of 2027 end date
items.detail: Discuss transition plans, get ahead of lease end.

items.text: Madison - re-engage Tony on Starbucks outparcel
items.detail: 2026 push. Tony = outparcel contact.

items.text: Madison - dust off sister building development plan (with Micah)
items.detail: Ask GC to reprice ~10k SF sister strip behind center. Grants still available (~$30k).

items.text: Madison - check if Muse's security deposit has burned off
items.detail: Muse's dad put up a deposit. Verify current status.

items.text: Madison - monitor Passage Kava (~3 months to default window)
items.detail: Oct 2023 start, 36-month lease = Oct 2026 end. Watch rent payments.

items.text: Malone - finalize Five Below lease (imminent)
items.detail: Also see sweep-3 for LOI sign/renderings task.

items.text: Malone - push Papaloo toward April real estate committee
items.detail: Interested but slow. If approved by committee, move to lease negotiation.

items.text: Malone - ask architect how much proactive Joanne's demo saves
items.detail: Joanne's vacating creates demo opportunity. Get GC/architect cost estimate.

items.text: Malone - confirm Marshalls September delivery window
items.detail: Verify September is achievable given current construction schedule.

items.text: Maple Row - proactively reach out to Flavors of India re: Hendersonville Nutrition space
items.detail: Space expires ~Oct 2026 (~7 months out). They tried last year, dragged feet. Offer before listing.

items.text: McMinnville - develop tenant-by-tenant rent increase/MTM plan
items.detail: Many tenants on MTM. Build a plan for each.

items.text: McMinnville - set up in-person meeting with Betty Blanks (Paddler's Mall)
items.detail: Re: suite reconfiguration for Wingstop/EPS.

items.text: Meridian - market building to Jackson-area doctors/dentists (if auction approved)
items.detail: Medical office angle. Pending auction decision.

items.text: Millington - list outparcel
items.detail: Confirm Tractor Supply no-build area doesn't restrict it first.

items.text: Millington - follow up on Hot Works inquiry
items.detail: Confirm whether Planet Fitness exclusion blocks hot yoga/infrared sauna.

items.text: New Memphis - draw out suite-split plan (3rd + 4th floor), hand to Mathison
items.detail: Low-cost demising walls, existing HVAC can flow through, existing windows. Ray (handyman) is the guy.

items.text: New Memphis - get banner/window signage on Barefoot Bride space (with Clay)
items.detail: Vacant space needs visibility.

items.text: Parma - watch Gabe's rent on 2nd of every month (with Carole)
items.detail: 3 missed rents already. One more = automatic default. Send default notice immediately on first late.

items.text: Pell City - finalize REA (4-parcel structure, new clean REA, with Melissa)
items.detail: Existing REA is a mess per Ashby. Melissa using Hamilton Dutch Bros as template.

items.text: Pell City - reach out to Fresh Value owner re: Bender suite / expansion interest
items.detail: Check if Fresh Value wants adjacent space.

items.text: Russellville - close Suite 12 pizza deal (Florence operator)
items.detail: Imminent. Florence-area pizza operator.

items.text: Sevierville - put mattress store space on market
items.detail: Cosmoprof doubtful to renew.

items.text: Sevierville - push outparcel once new leasing hire is in place
items.detail: Hold until hire is onboard.

items.text: Trousdale/Vann - approach Bo Rucker about early renewal in context of sale
items.detail: Locking in a renewal strengthens the sale story.

items.text: Trousdale/Vann - follow up with national apparel store broker (Replay replacement)
items.detail: Replay vacated. Broker has national contacts.

items.text: Wilson - follow up on FRWD renewal

tour at 11; confirm city/zoning path for Redline/HopeSmiles.
